rule: PLEASER stages must never auto-advance when the stage executor is missing
L1 reports must surface concrete pipeline state and next planned step, not just scavenger row count delta
Never reference 'orchestration engine', 'data density threshold', 'preparation phase', or similar invented components
Every status reply MUST begin with the 4-line Assessor block (Task/Progress/Liveness/Flags)
Every claim that a process is running requires ps output with PID; every claim a file is growing requires stat size; absent tool output = say unknown
